text:
That Day may refer to:
That Day (Chapter 2) - The 2nd chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
That Day: The Fall of Shiganshina, Part 2 - The 2nd episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
Since That Day - The recap episode of the anime.
That Day (Chapter 86) - The 86th chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
That Day (Episode 57) - The 57th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
